title: Mite (disambiguation)
content:
'''Mites''' were arachnoid creatures of various sizes that existed on many worlds. Many lived in hives ruled by queens.

Known mite species and subspecies included:

*[[Bark mite]] ([[Rori/Legends|Rori]], [[Endor/Legends|Endor]])
*[[Decay mite]] ([[Talus/Legends|Talus]])
*[[Drillmite]] ([[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]])
*[[Dust mite]] (Tatooine)
*[[Force mite]] ([[Balanor]])
*[[Itch mite/Legends|Itch mite]]
*[[KyLessian feather mite]] {KyLessia}
*[[Venom-mite/Legends|Venom-mite]]
*[[Ore mite]]
*[[Ralltiiri glowmite]] ([[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]])
*[[Rockmite/Legends|Rockmite]] ([[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]])
*[[Shear mite]] ([[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]])
*[[Stone mite/Legends|Stone mite]] (various planets)
*[[Tanc mite]] ([[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]])
*[[Garqi vert-mite]] ([[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]])

{{Disambig}}
